title: Group Similar Automations
excerpt: It would be nice to be able to group together automations in the automations section of the board. For example - in a workaround using an app to automatically move items to a specific group on the board based on the date…

posts.author: kphays (Katelyn Hays)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be nice to be able to group together automations in the automations section of the board. For example - in a workaround using an app to automatically move items to a specific group on the board based on the date, I have to now create 12 separate automations for each month group. To help keep the board automations in the automations center organized, it would be nice if I could select certain automations to be part of a group in the automations center. Similar to putting items in a folder - then I can name that group/folder whatever i need it to be named to describe what those related automations are for.
